g.data-narration: Sawtooth Lake is an open-source blockchain platform developed by Intel, now part of Hyperledger.
Sawtooth Lake is an Intel-developed blockchain platform designed for high scalability and flexibility in enterprise applications.
g.text: Open-source blockchain platform by Intel → Hyperledger/Linux Foundation
Designed for: Scalability, Flexibility, Enterprise-grade applications

g.data-narration: The architecture consists of Validator Nodes, Transaction Families, and PoET Consensus Algorithm working together.
Validator nodes are the core components that validate transactions, create blocks, and maintain blockchain integrity.
Transaction families define rules for transaction processing. Sawtooth supports multiple families including Settings, PBFT, and Raft.
Proof of Elapsed Time (PoET) is a lottery-based consensus that allows validators to vote on the next block fairly.
Sawtooth Lake is highly scalable, supporting thousands of transactions per second for enterprise needs.
Flexibility comes from supporting multiple transaction families and consensus algorithms for diverse applications.
Advanced security includes encryption and secure key management to protect blockchain integrity.
Supply Chain Management: Track goods and materials movement with immutable blockchain records.
Financial Services: Secure transactions. Healthcare: Secure medical records management on blockchain.
Example: Supply Chain Solutions company builds a blockchain system using validator nodes and transaction families.
g.text: Company: "Supply Chain Solutions" builds blockchain-based supply chain system

g.data-narration: Key Points: Open-source Intel platform, PoET consensus, scalable, flexible, multiple transaction families, secure.
Exam Tips: Remember key facts about Sawtooth Lake including PoET, transaction families, scalability, and use cases.
g.text: 1. Sawtooth Lake = Open-source blockchain by Intel (now Hyperledger)
2. Uses PoET consensus (Proof of Elapsed Time)
3. Supports multiple transaction families & consensus algorithms
4. Use cases: Supply Chain, Finance, Healthcare

g.data-narration: Learning Outcomes: You can now describe the architecture, explain key features, and identify use cases of Sawtooth Lake.
g.text: • Describe Sawtooth Lake architecture (Validator Nodes, Transaction Families, PoET)
• Explain key features (Scalability, Flexibility, Security) & Identify use cases

g.data-narration: End of lesson. Practice these concepts to prepare for your exams.
g.text: university 2022 Scheme - CSE | Sawtooth Lake - Complete Lesson
